    Hierarchy For All Packages

    Class Hierarchy

    • java.lang.Object
      • javafx.application.Application

          • entity.character.Bat
          • entity.character.Ghost

          • javafx.scene.layout.Region
            • javafx.scene.layout.Pane
              • gui.GamePane
